title: AnnotationReview
description: One review act on a Lowering's annotation, per design/lowering-record-sketch-01.md L6. Mirrors substrate.ReviewEntry shape. Used in two contexts: (1) inside Annotation.review_states for authored reviews carried with the Lowering; (2) as standalone probe output — the reader-model probe emits AnnotationReview records via annotation_review_candidates. The two-context use per PFS7-X2's sub-record rule promotes this record to a sibling schema file rather than inline $defs. PFS9-AR1..AR4.

reviewer_id.description: Stable identifier for the reviewer (human handle or LLM-probe identifier). PFS9-AR2.

reviewed_at_τ_a.description: Author-time τ_a at which the review was recorded. PFS9-AR2.

verdict.description: Closed enum matching Python's VERDICT_* constants. approved = fine as-is; needs-work = revision requested with specific concern; rejected = remove / replace; noted = read but no position taken. PFS9-AR3.

anchor_τ_a.description: Snapshot of the Lowering's τ_a (or the reviewed record's τ_a) at review time. If the record's τ_a advances past this value, downstream tooling surfaces the review as stale. PFS9-AR2.

comment.description: Optional reviewer prose. Python default None → omitted from dump; any set string emits unconditionally. PFS9-AR4.
